outreach_subject: A European angle on your Rana Residence LA Design | CA Architects piece

replies.subject: Re: A European angle on your Rana Residence LA Design | CA Architects piece
replies.body:
Not interested. Please remove us from your mailing list.


Kiyan Gerami
Marketing & Accounting Manager

Gerami Architectural Corporation
(310) 310-8800
www.geramiarchitecture.com
kiyan@geramiarchitecture.com
1001 Wilshire Blvd Suite 2051
Los Angeles, CA 90017


On Thu, Jul 9, 2026 at 11:19 PM Lisa Monelli <info@myvilla.la> wrote:

> Hi team,
>
> I came across your feature on the Rana Residence and appreciated how
> the piece highlighted the interplay between clean geometry and
> material honesty, particularly in the way the concrete forms anchor
> the home against the LA landscape.
>
> I'm writing on behalf of My Villa, a studio building Italian-designed
> homes in Los Angeles using reinforced concrete, or cemento a vista, a
> technique rooted in Mediterranean building tradition where structure
> and finish are one and the same. It struck us as a natural
> conversation alongside the material approach in Rana Residence.
>
> Would you be open to receiving some material on our work, or perhaps a
> short call with our founder, Paolo Mezzalama, to talk through the
> design philosophy behind it?
>
> Best,
> Lisa Monelli
> My Villa Media Team
> info@myvilla.la · myvilla.la
>
replies.snippet: Not interested. Please remove us from your mailing list. Kiyan Gerami Marketing & Accounting Manager Gerami Architectural Corporation (310) 310-8800 www.geramiarchitecture.com kiyan@
